member.name: T:DDG.BinMatrixServiceExtensions
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.BinMatrixServiceExtensions.EvaluateString(Prime.BinMatrixService.IBinMatrixService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Evaluates BinMatrix spec values for tokens encapsulated with {}.
member.param: Flow number. When is not specified the method will try to get current flow number from test instance parameter.

member.name: T:DDG.BitArrayExtensions
member.summary: Extension functions dealing with BitArray objects.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.ToBitArray(System.String)
member.summary: String extension method. Turns a string of 1s and 0s into a BitArray. A 1 in the string is a true in the BitArray, 0 (or any other character) is false.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.ToBinaryString(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: BitArray extension method. Turns a BitArray into a string of 1s and 0s. The BitArray true maps to 1, while false maps to 0.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.Slice(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a slice of a BitArray.
member.exception: if start + size is larger than the size of the bit array.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.Add(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Appends one BitArray to another.
member.returns: new BitArray containing the contents of both BitArrays.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.Write(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Writes the binary data to the bit array starting at the given location.
member.returns: New bitarray with the new data.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.Write(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Int32,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Writes the binary data to the bit array starting at the given location.
member.returns: New bitarray with the new data.

member.name: M:DDG.BitArrayExtensions.Any(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Check if any value in the bitarray matches the given value.
member.returns: True if any value in the bitarray matches the value parameter.

member.name: T:DDG.DoubleExtensions
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.DoubleExtensions.Equals(System.Double,System.Double,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Checks if 2 double values are equal to the given number of decimal places.
member.param: Number of decimal places to check for equality (0 means exact match).
member.returns: true if the values are equivalent.

member.name: T:DDG.DutStorage`1
member.summary: Dff service local storage.
member.typeparam: The type of the stored object.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The constructor function used to create the stored object.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset storage data.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.Get(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get stored object by session.
member.returns: The stored object for this session.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.Insert(`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.name: M:DDG.DutStorage`1.GetLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a lock object by session.
member.returns: The lock object for this session.

member.name: T:DDG.ExpressionContext
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetValueFromTrialVar(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value from a trial variable.
member.param: The parameter in the format T.collection.variable.
member.returns: The value of the trial variable.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetEnvironmentVariable(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value of an environment variable.
member.param: The parameter in the format T.collection.variable.
member.returns: The value of the environment variable.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.EvaluateDoublesArray(System.Object[])
member.summary: Evaluates an array of objects and converts them to an array of doubles.
member.param: The array of objects to be evaluated.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToInt64(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a 64-bit signed integer.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToInt64(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a 64-bit signed integer.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToInt32(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a 32-bit signed integer.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToInt32(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a 32-bit signed integer.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToDouble(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts an object to a double value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Converts an object to a double value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToDouble(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an int to a double value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToDouble(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts an int to a double value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToString(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts the specified value to a string.
member.returns: The string representation of the value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Random
member.summary: Generates a random double value between 0.0 and 1.0.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetDelimitedData(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the delimited data from the input string.
member.param: The index of the delimited data.
The delimiter used to separate the data.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Length(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the length of the string representation of the specified value.
member.param: The value to get the length of.
member.returns: The length of the string representation of the value.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Substring(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a substring from the specified value.
member.param: The value to retrieve the substring from.
The starting index of the substring.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Bin2Int(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a binary number to an integer.
member.param: Flag indicating whether the least significant bit is first.
Flag indicating whether the binary number is in two's complement form.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Bin2Dec(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a binary number to an integer.
member.param: Flag indicating whether the least significant bit is first.
Flag indicating whether the binary number is in two's complement form.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Bin2Dec(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a binary number to an integer.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Bin2Long(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a binary number to a long integer.
member.param: Indicates whether the least significant bit is first.
Indicates whether the binary number is in two's complement form.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Bin2Hex(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a binary number to its hexadecimal representation.
member.param: The length of the hexadecimal representation.
member.returns: The hexadecimal representation of the binary number.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Dec2Bin(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a decimal number to a binary string representation.
member.param: The number of bits in the binary representation.
Indicates whether to use two's complement representation.
member.returns: The binary string representation of the decimal number.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Hex2Bin(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a hexadecimal number to a binary string representation.
member.param: The number of bits in the binary representation.
member.returns: The binary string representation of the hexadecimal number.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Reverses the characters in a string.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Double2UQmn(System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a voltage value from decimal to binary in unsigned Q1.9 format.
member.param: The number of bits for the integer portion of voltage.
The number of bits for the decimal portion of voltage.
member.returns: The converted Binary string in UQmn format.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetPatSymbolString(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the pattern symbol string for the specified value and size.
member.param: The value to generate the pattern symbol string for.
The size of the pattern symbol string.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetCurrentDataBin
member.summary: Gets the current data bin.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetCurrentSoftBin
member.summary: Gets the current soft bin.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetCurrentHardBin
member.summary: Gets the current hard bin.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ExecCallback(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Executes a callback function with optional arguments.
member.param: The name of the callback function.
The optional arguments for the callback function.
member.returns: The result of the callback function.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.XorBitWise(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs a bitwise XOR operation on two binary strings.
member.returns: The result of the XOR operation.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.OrBitWise(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs a bitwise OR operation on two binary strings.
member.returns: The result of the OR operation.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.AndBitWise(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs a bitwise AND operation on two binary strings.
member.returns: The result of the AND operation.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.NotBitWise(System.String)
member.summary: Performs a bitwise NOT operation on a binary string.
member.returns: The result of the NOT operation.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Max(System.Object[])
member.summary: Returns the maximum value from a list of objects.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Min(System.Object[])
member.summary: Returns the minimum value from a list of objects.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.IsMatch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a string matches a regular expression pattern.
member.returns: True if the string matches the pattern, otherwise false.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Contains(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a string contains a specified substring.
member.returns: True if the string contains the substring, otherwise false.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Replace(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string with another substring.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.LinearFit(System.Object,System.Object,System.Char)
member.summary: Performs a linear fit on the given data points.
member.param: The x-values of the data points.
The y-values of the data points.
The delimiter used to separate the values in the input objects.
member.returns: A string containing the intercept, slope, and R-squared value of the linear fit.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.LittleEndian(System.String)
member.summary: Applies little endian conversion to the hex string.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Count(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Counts the number of occurrences of a string in a string.
member.returns: The number of occurrences of the character in the string.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.IndexOf(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the specified string in a string.
member.returns: The zero-based index position of the first occurrence, if found; otherwise, -1.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.LastIndexOf(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the zero-based index of the last occurrence of the specified string in a string.
member.returns: The zero-based index position of the last occurrence, if found; otherwise, -1.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.SelectArrayElements(System.Object,System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Selects elements from an array based on the specified range.
member.param: The range of elements to select.
The delimiter used in the input array.
member.returns: The selected elements as an object.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.SelectArrayElement(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Char)
member.summary: Selects an element from an array based on the specified index.
member.param: The index of the element to select.
The delimiter used to split the array object.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.SubtractArrays(System.Object,System.Object,System.Char)
member.summary: Subtracts two arrays.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ScalarMultiplyArray(System.Double,System.Object,System.Char)
member.summary: Multiplies a scalar with an array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMax(System.Object[])
member.summary: Returns the maximum value in the array.
member.param: The array of objects to evaluate.
member.returns: The maximum value in the array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMax(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Returns the maximum value in the array.
member.param: The array of objects to evaluate.
member.returns: The maximum value in the array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMax(System.Double[])
member.summary: Returns the maximum value in the array.
member.param: The array of objects to evaluate.
member.returns: The maximum value in the array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMin(System.Object[])
member.summary: Returns the minimum value from an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMin(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Returns the minimum value from an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMin(System.Double[])
member.summary: Returns the minimum value from an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayAverage(System.Object[])
member.summary: Calculates the average value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayAverage(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Calculates the average value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayAverage(System.Double[])
member.summary: Calculates the average value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMedian(System.Object[])
member.summary: Calculates the median value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMedian(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Calculates the median value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArrayMedian(System.Double[])
member.summary: Calculates the median value of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Percentile(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Char)
member.summary: Calculates the percentile value from an array of numbers.
member.param: The delimiter used to split the array if it is provided as a string.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ArraySum(System.Object[])
member.summary: Calculates the sum of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Sum(System.Double[])
member.summary: Calculates the sum of an array of doubles.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.IQR(System.Object[])
member.summary: Calculates the inter-quantile range (IQR) of a given array of numbers.
member.returns: The inter-quantile range (IQR) of the array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Join(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Joins the elements of an array into a single string using the specified delimiter.
member.param: The delimiter to use between elements.
member.returns: A string that contains the joined elements of the array.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.Split(System.String,System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Splits a string into an array based on a delimiter and converts the elements to the specified type.
member.param: The type to convert the elements to.
The delimiter used to split the string.
member.returns: An array of elements of the specified type.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetSharedStorageString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value from shared storage.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetSharedStorageInt(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value from shared storage.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetSharedStorageDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value from shared storage.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetValueFromDff(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value from DFF based on the provided parameter.
member.param: The parameter to retrieve the value from DFF.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.GetResistanceOffset(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the resistance offset for the specified parameter.
member.param: The parameter to get the resistance offset for.

member.summary: Gets the Vmin forwarding value.

member.summary: Concatenates the specified parameters.

member.name: M:DDG.ExpressionContext.ToString(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an integer value to its string representation.
member.returns: The string representation of the integer value.

member.name: T:DDG.FileUtilities
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.FileUtilities.GetFile(System.String)
member.summary: Wrapper function for Prime GetFile which actually prints out the name of the file if it isn't found or GetFile fails.
member.param: Filename to create a local copy of.

member.name: T:DDG.Gsds
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.Gsds.TryGetToken(System.String,System.Object@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if a token exists, returns true if it does. Throws an exception if the token is not in SharedStorage format.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: M:DDG.Gsds.IsTokenFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a given string is in GSDS format (G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name) and returns true if it is.
member.returns: true if the token is in G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name format.

member.name: M:DDG.Gsds.WriteToken(System.String,System.Object,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a gsds token with the given value.
member.param: GSDS token name of the form G.[ULI].[SDI].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: M:DDG.Gsds.ReadToken(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reads a SharedStorage token and returns the value as a string.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DDG.HdmtExpression.ExpressionContext
member.summary: Gets expression context. Used for lambda functions.

member.name: P:DDG.HdmtExpression.ExpressionAsText
member.summary: Gets the original text of the expression for telemetry logging. Should be the same as this.OriginalExpression, but using OriginalExpression in telemetry caused random hangs when running expressions in parallel threads. Not sure why.

member.name: M:DDG.HdmtExpression.Evaluate
member.summary: Wrapper to Evaluate the Expression.

member.name: M:DDG.HdmtExpression.TryGetValueFromDff(System.String,System.String@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reads the value of a token.

member.summary: Reads a value from a trial variable.

member.name: M:DDG.HdmtExpression.GetEnvironmentVariable(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value of an environment variable.
member.param: The parameter in the format T.collection.variable.
member.returns: The value of the environment variable.

member.name: M:DDG.HdmtExpression.GetResistanceOffset(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieves the resistance offset value for the specified parameter.
member.param: The parameter in the format R.O.variable.

member.name: M:DDG.HdmtExpression.GetVminForwardingValue(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reads the Vmin forwarding value.

member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:DDG.PatternOccurrence
member.summary: Tuple with pattern occurrence information.

member.name: M:DDG.PatternOccurrence.#ctor(System.UInt64,System.String,System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DDG.PatternOccurrence.Burst
member.summary: Gets the burst index.

member.name: P:DDG.PatternOccurrence.PatternName
member.summary: Gets the pattern name.

member.name: P:DDG.PatternOccurrence.Occurrence
member.summary: Gets the pattern occurrence.

member.name: P:DDG.PatternOccurrence.Index
member.summary: Gets the pattern index.

member.name: M:DDG.PatternOccurrence.Equals(DDG.PatternOccurrence)
member.summary: Compares current and other object.

member.name: T:DDG.PlistUtilities
member.summary: Plist utilities for Vmin searches.

member.name: M:DDG.PlistUtilities.GetPlistContentsIndex(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts plist contents index converting from position to occurrence.

member.name: T:DDG.RadixConversion
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.BinaryToHex(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: String extension method. Convert the given binary string to a Hex string (no size restrictions).
member.param: Bool value, set to true if the binary string is LSB first. (Default is true, which means MSB first).
member.exception: if the input data is null or empty.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.BinaryToInteger(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: String extension method. Convert the given binary string to decimal (32 bit integer).
member.param: Bool value, set to true if the binary string is LSB first. (Default is true, which means MSB first).
Bool value, if true the binary is treated as a 2s compliment encoding.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.BinaryToLong(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: String extension method. Convert the given binary string to decimal (64 bit integer).
member.param: Bool value, set to true if the binary string is LSB first. (Default is true, which means MSB first).
Bool value, if true the binary is treated as a 2s compliment encoding.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.TwosComplementToInteger(System.String)
member.summary: String extension method. Convert the given binary string (in 2s Complement encoding) to decimal (32 bits integer).

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.IntegerToBinary(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: String extension method. Converts the positive integer value (stored in a string) into a binary value (stored in a string).
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.LongToBinary2Comp(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: String extension method. Converts the positive integer value (stored in a string) into a binary value (stored in a string).
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.IntegerToBinary(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Int extension method. Converts the positive integer value into a binary value (stored in a string).
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.HexToBinary(System.Char,System.Int32)
member.summary: Char extension method. Converts the Hexadecimal character into a binary value.
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:DDG.RadixConversion.HexToBinary(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: String extension method. Converts the Hexadecimal value into a binary value.
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: T:DDG.SpecSet
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.SpecSet.ReadToken(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if a token exists, returns true if it does. Throws an exception if the token is not in SpecSet format.
member.param: SpecSet token name of the form S.[TL].Name.

member.name: T:DDG.StringExtensions
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Simply reverses a string. This is the fastest way I could find to do it.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ResizeBinary(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resizes the binary number. It will either pad (to the left) with 0s, or cut (from the left) extra bits.)
member.param: Expected size (0 means return as is).

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.RangeToList(System.String)
member.summary: Function to convert a string range into a list of integers. Example ranges: "3,6-8" becomes { 3, 6, 7, 8 }.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ExpandRangedString(System.String)
member.summary: Expands ranged/compressed string.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ToDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Converts string with or without units to double value. Able to handle units multipliers and scientific notation.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ToDouble(System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Converts string with or without units to double value. Able to handle units multipliers and scientific notation.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.TryConvertUnits(System.String)
member.summary: Tries to evaluate value containing units.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.EvaluateToken(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluates the token as a string gsds or uservar or literal.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.EvaluateExpression(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluates a string expression to a double value.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ToInt(System.String)
member.summary: Converts string to int32.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ToInt(System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Converts string to int32.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.GetPatSymbolString(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets string data into PatSymbol. Able to process binary, integer and hex representation.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ReplaceTokens(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Replaces token in curly brackets with specified value.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ReplaceTokens(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.Object}},System.String)
member.summary: Replaces token in curly brackets with specified value.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ExtractTokens(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts tokens enclosed in curly brackets from the input string.

member.name: M:DDG.StringExtensions.ReplaceCharAt(System.String,System.Int32,System.Char)
member.summary: Replaces the character at the specified index with a new character.
member.param: The index of the character to replace.
member.returns: A new string with the character replaced.
member.exception: Thrown when the index is out of the range of the input string.

member.name: T:DDG.TestMethodExtensions
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.TestMethodExtensions.PrintParameters``1(``0,Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodBase.PrimeLogLevel,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints all instance parameters using reflection.

member.name: T:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions.GetCurrentDefaultTiming(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns current instance timings.

member.name: M:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions.GetCurrentDefaultLevel(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns current instance levels.

member.name: M:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions.GetCurrentFlowNumber(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns current instance flow number.

member.name: M:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions.GetCurrentLogLevel(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the value of the LogLevel parameter for a Callback/UserFunction. Will be "DISABLED" if called from Evergreen code.
member.returns: Value of LogLevel, DISABLED, TEST_METHOD, or Enabled.

member.name: M:DDG.TestProgramServiceExtensions.GetPrimeConsole(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the Prime ConsoleService or null depending on whether the LogLevel is enabled in ISessionContextProviderContainer.

member.name: T:DDG.UserVar
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: T:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes
member.summary: Defines the valid Hdmt UserVariable types.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.BOOLEAN
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.DOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.INTEGER
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.STRING
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYBOOLEAN
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYDOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYINTEGER
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYSTRING
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: M:DDG.UserVar.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the given UserVar exists, false otherwise.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable name of form collection.variable .

member.name: M:DDG.UserVar.Write(System.String,DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes an uservar of the given type.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
String value to write. It will be converted to the correct type, ARRAY types should be a comma-separated string.

member.name: M:DDG.UserVar.Read(System.String,DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes)
member.summary: Reads the value of the given Hdmt UserVariable.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
member.returns: Value as a string. ARRAY types will be a comma-separated string.

member.name: M:DDG.UserVar.ReadAndGetType(System.String,DDG.UserVar.ValidTypes@)
member.summary: Reads the value of the given Hdmt UserVariable without knowing the type. The parameter "type" will be updated with the actual type that was read.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
member.returns: Value as a string. ARRAY types will be a comma-separated string.

member.name: T:DDG.Utils
member.summary: Different common utilities.

member.name: M:DDG.Utils.ExtractData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Char[]@)
member.summary: Extracts CTV data dictionary into a char array. Optimized for test time.
